abilities.description: CARDNAME deals 3 damage to each opponent.
You may cast target red instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If that spell would be put into your graveyard this turn, exile it instead.

effect.description: You may cast target red instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If that spell would be put into your graveyard this turn, exile it instead.
effect.name: Play

abilities.target_prompt: Select target red instant or sorcery card

abilities.description: Discard your hand, then draw seven cards. Until end of turn, you may cast spells from your hand without paying their mana costs.
